securityNote: Security Note: Your API key is encrypted and stored locally in your browser. It is NEVER uploaded to any third-party server. Please do not use this on public devices.
fetchModelsFailed: Failed to fetch model list, please check your key and endpoint URL
advancedHeadersDesc: Configure custom HTTP headers for CORS bypass or additional API provider authentication.
clearAllConfirm: Are you sure you want to clear all projects and images?
resetConfirm: Reset captions and status for visible images?
deleteSelectedConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete {count} selected images?
batchSubtitle: Modify captions for all visible images in the current view.
noImages: No images available for batch editing.
moveDesc: Move {count} selected images to another project.
mergeDesc: Merge '{name}' into another project. The source project will be deleted.
tutWelcomeDesc: A powerful tool designed for AI model training dataset preparation. Easily organize, caption, and export your image datasets.
tutImportDesc: Simply drag an entire folder (with subdirectories) into the app. We automatically organize them into projects based on folder names.
tutSelectDesc: Click to select. Shift+Click for range select. Click & Drag across images to 'Paint Select' multiple items quickly.
tutTagDesc: Configure your API Key in settings. Use 'Start All' to auto-caption everything, or use the Inspector to edit individually.
tutExportDesc: Export as a ZIP file. The structure is perfectly formatted for LoRA training: Image + Text file pairs organized by folders.
cleanDescription: Rules are applied automatically during generation. You can also run them manually on existing tags.
cleanTip: Tip: Use /pattern/flags for advanced regex (e.g. /\b(girl|boy)\b/gi). Default is Case-Insensitive Global match.
confirmCleanSelected: Apply specific rules to {count} selected images?
confirmCleanAll: Apply {rules} rules to ALL {count} visible images? This cannot be undone easily.
offlineWarning: You are currently offline. Local features are still available, but AI generation is disabled.
selectAnImage: Select an image to edit details
